spec.name: A Junction In The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are by a junction where three paths meet. Ancient grey trees tower above you on all sides. Paths lead north, east and west.

north.description: The narrow path winds its way through the trees to the north.

east.description: The narrow path winds its way through the trees to the east.

west.description: The narrow path winds its way through the trees to the west.

extra_descs.description: The ancient grey giants seem to observe you silently.
The path seems all too frail. One of the giant roots could probably crush it in a single blow.
